name: client-vite
//megasharkLibSource: `megashark-lib` needs its `prepare` script to run to build `dist/`, which `npm install` can't do (scripts are disabled, see `.npmrc`). So it isn't listed under `dependencies` and is installed by the `megashark:install` script (see `scripts/build_megashark_lib.cjs`) instead, run as part of the scripts that need it.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:eslint && npm run lint:tsc
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:eslint -- --fix && npm run lint:tsc
scripts.native:build: npm run megashark:install && npm run electron:install && node ./scripts/vite_build_for_native.cjs
scripts.native:build:dev: npm run megashark:install && npm run electron:install && node ./scripts/vite_build_for_native.cjs --mode development
scripts.electron:copy: npm run native:build && npm run electron:copy:webapp
scripts.electron:copy:dev: npm run native:build:dev && npm run electron:copy:webapp
scripts.electron:open: npm run electron:copy:dev && cd electron && npm run electron:start
scripts.electron:release: npm run electron:copy && cd electron && npm run electron:release
scripts.electron:hardened: npm run electron:copy && cd electron && npm run electron:hardened
scripts.electron:release:dev: npm run electron:copy:dev && cd electron && npm run electron:release
scripts.electron:debug: npm run electron:copy && cd electron && npm run electron:start
scripts.megashark:local:stop: npm unlink megashark-lib --no-save && npm run megashark:install

//: ⚠️ Updating ViteJS requires to also update `build.target` config in `client/vite.config.ts`
